pinned_world.axes: N ~ Normal(0,1) via random.Random(seed).gauss; R ~ Normal(0,1) via random.Random(seed+10000).gauss; separate streams => corr(N,R)=0 in population by construction
pinned_world.metric: Pearson r; rho_full over full 2000; rho_admit over OR subset; rho_single over single-gate subset
pinned_world.or_gate: admit iff N>=t OR R>=t, t=Phi^-1(sqrt(1-T))
pinned_world.pooling: pooled mean = mean of 5 per-seed rho; sigma = sample SD (ddof=1); SE = sigma/sqrt(5)
pinned_world.single_gate: admit iff N>=a ALONE, a=Phi^-1(1-T) at T=0.25

preregistered_gates.R3: dose-response: mean rho_OR 50% > 25% > 10%, each adjacent pair separated |ma-mb|/sqrt(SEa^2+SEb^2) >= 3
preregistered_gates.decision_rule: APPROVE iff R1 and R2 and R3 and R4 (order R1->R2->R3->R4); REJECT if R1 or R3 or R4 fail; NULL if R2 sub-threshold; INVALID if rates miss targets or non-deterministic
